2020 External Plugins

External online - Links to github antora components
External offline -Packaged with the tarball

The entire OpenCPN Dokuwiki is about 884mb. Cleaned cache and attic
pages = 3.5mb (for all 4 books)
media = 438 mb (for all 4 books
I have tried to find my estimates for pdf compiled documentation for User Manual and for External Plugins in CF but have not found them yet.

OpenCPN User Manual 4.8.6 2018 was 25mb compressed pdf.
It has since gotten bigger.

Media screenshots are a big part of the problem.
Use only what is necessary, crop and compact them to 70-75%.
No bigger than 540pixels wide.
We should further refine these screenshot standards.
